name: Guest user completes full checkout flow

steps.name: Given user opens Nykaa website
And user verifies homepage is loaded
When user searches for "shampoo"
Then search results should be displayed
When user selects the first product from results
Then product details page should be opened
When user clicks on add to bag button
Then product should be added to cart successfully
When user opens the shopping cart
Then cart page should be visible
When user proceeds to checkout
Then user should be redirected to login or guest option page
When user selects continue as guest user
Then user should be on address details page
When user enters valid address details
And user enters name "Test User"
And user enters phone "9999999999"
And user enters email "testuser@gmail.com"
And user enters house number "221B"
And user enters area "Delhi"
And user enters pincode "110001"
Then shipping or delivery options should be displayed
When user confirms address
Then user should reach payment page or final checkout page

fullName: Nykaa End to End Checkout: Guest user completes full checkout flow
